news.title:
Prince Pipes received a GST demand order for FY 2019-20 totaling ₹31.1 lakh.
The company deems the demand as non-maintainable and plans to respond within the prescribed time.
news.summary:
Prince Pipes received a GST demand order for FY 2019-20 totaling ₹31.1 lakh.
The company deems the demand as non-maintainable and plans to respond within the prescribed time.

news.title:
Geopolitical tensions and rising crude prices impact consumer durables, plywood, pipes, and tiles sectors, causing cost inflation and margin concerns.
Amber Enterprises, Voltas, Blue Star, Havells, Greenply, Century Plyboards, Kajaria Ceramics, Cera Sanitaryware, Finolex, Astral, and Prince Pipes see stock declines since Feb 27.
news.summary:
Geopolitical tensions and rising crude prices impact consumer durables, plywood, pipes, and tiles sectors, causing cost inflation and margin concerns.
Amber Enterprises, Voltas, Blue Star, Havells, Greenply, Century Plyboards, Kajaria Ceramics, Cera Sanitaryware, Finolex, Astral, and Prince Pipes see stock declines since Feb 27.

news.title:
OIJIF secures $100M first close for its third fund, targeting $250-300M final close within a year.
OIJIF's portfolio includes Stanley Lifestyles, Divgi TorqTransfer, Senco Gold, Prince Pipes, and others.
news.summary:
OIJIF secures $100M first close for its third fund, targeting $250-300M final close within a year.
OIJIF's portfolio includes Stanley Lifestyles, Divgi TorqTransfer, Senco Gold, Prince Pipes, and others.

news.title:
Supreme Industries, Astral, Prince Pipes shares surged up to 7% on PVC price hike.
PVC prices rose ₹33.5/kg YTD, boosting sales volumes and stock replenishment.
news.summary:
Supreme Industries, Astral, Prince Pipes shares surged up to 7% on PVC price hike.
PVC prices rose ₹33.5/kg YTD, boosting sales volumes and stock replenishment.

news.title:
Prince Pipes Q3 revenue at INR 573 crore, volume up 3% YoY.
EBITDA INR 28 crore with 5% margin; new CPVC brand shows high growth.
news.summary:
Prince Pipes Q3 revenue at INR 573 crore, volume up 3% YoY.
EBITDA INR 28 crore with 5% margin; new CPVC brand shows high growth.

news.title:
Prince Pipes shared the audio recording link for its Q3 FY26 results conference call.
The call discussed unaudited standalone financial results for the quarter and nine months ending Dec 31, 2025.
news.summary:
Prince Pipes shared the audio recording link for its Q3 FY26 results conference call.
The call discussed unaudited standalone financial results for the quarter and nine months ending Dec 31, 2025.

news.title:
Prince Pipes aims for double-digit volume growth in FY27.
The company plans a Rs.225-230 crore capex to achieve this target.
news.summary:
Prince Pipes aims for double-digit volume growth in FY27.
The company plans a Rs.225-230 crore capex to achieve this target.

news.title:
Prince Pipes posted a Q3 net loss of ₹3.3M, improving from ₹204M YoY.
The company reported an exceptional item of ₹21M in the quarter.
news.summary:
Prince Pipes posted a Q3 net loss of ₹3.3M, improving from ₹204M YoY.
The company reported an exceptional item of ₹21M in the quarter.

news.title:
Prince Pipes to hold board meeting on Feb 10, 2026, to review unaudited financial results for Q3 and nine months ended Dec 31, 2025.
Trading window closure is effective from Jan 1 to Feb 12, 2026, abiding by SEBI norms.
news.summary:
Prince Pipes to hold board meeting on Feb 10, 2026, to review unaudited financial results for Q3 and nine months ended Dec 31, 2025.
Trading window closure is effective from Jan 1 to Feb 12, 2026, abiding by SEBI norms.

news.title:
Plastic pipe makers face earnings pressure due to weak demand, cheap PVC imports, and policy delays on ADD and BIS rules.
Supreme, Astral, and Finolex are better placed, while Prince and Apollo Pipes may struggle with capacity additions and price wars.
news.summary:
Plastic pipe makers face earnings pressure due to weak demand, cheap PVC imports, and policy delays on ADD and BIS rules.
Supreme, Astral, and Finolex are better placed, while Prince and Apollo Pipes may struggle with capacity additions and price wars.

news.title:
CRISIL reaffirmed Prince Pipes and Fittings Ltd's ratings at Crisil A (Negative) for long-term and Crisil A1 for short-term facilities.
Ratings reflect strong business profile, diverse product offerings, financial stability, but are hindered by raw material price volatility and intense competition.
news.summary:
CRISIL reaffirmed Prince Pipes and Fittings Ltd's ratings at Crisil A (Negative) for long-term and Crisil A1 for short-term facilities.
Ratings reflect strong business profile, diverse product offerings, financial stability, but are hindered by raw material price volatility and intense competition.

news.title:
Prince Pipes received a GST demand order totaling ₹23.85L for FY 2021-22.
The company disputes the demand and plans to appeal, with no expected financial impact.
news.summary:
Prince Pipes received a GST demand order totaling ₹23.85L for FY 2021-22.
The company disputes the demand and plans to appeal, with no expected financial impact.

news.title:
Prince Pipes reports Q2 FY26 revenue at INR595 cr, volumes at 42,761 MT.
Bihar plant Phase 2 adds 65,000 MT capacity; margins targeted at 12% by Q4 FY26.
news.summary:
Prince Pipes reports Q2 FY26 revenue at INR595 cr, volumes at 42,761 MT.
Bihar plant Phase 2 adds 65,000 MT capacity; margins targeted at 12% by Q4 FY26.

news.title:
Prince Pipes shared audio link of Q2FY26 results call held on Nov 10, 2025.
Recording details available at www.princepipes.com/audio/Q2FY26/concall/audio.mp3.
news.summary:
Prince Pipes shared audio link of Q2FY26 results call held on Nov 10, 2025.
Recording details available at www.princepipes.com/audio/Q2FY26/concall/audio.mp3.

news.title:
Prince Pipes expects high single-digit volume growth in FY26.
Capacity expansion aims to enhance service coverage across India.
news.summary:
Prince Pipes expects high single-digit volume growth in FY26.
Capacity expansion aims to enhance service coverage across India.

news.title:
Prince Pipes expands with Bihar plant Phase 2, display centers in J&K, U.P.
Targets 15% annual volume growth via CPVC, plumbing, bathware lines.
news.summary:
Prince Pipes expands with Bihar plant Phase 2, display centers in J&K, U.P.
Targets 15% annual volume growth via CPVC, plumbing, bathware lines.

news.title:
Prince Pipes Q2 net profit at 146M, down YoY from 147M; revenue falls to 5.95B from 6.22B.
EBITDA rises to 551M from 457M YoY, boosting margin to 9.3% vs 7.4% YoY.
news.summary:
Prince Pipes Q2 net profit at 146M, down YoY from 147M; revenue falls to 5.95B from 6.22B.
EBITDA rises to 551M from 457M YoY, boosting margin to 9.3% vs 7.4% YoY.
